# Data-exfil ranking by out/in ratio + fleet-relative share and deviation via dual windowcomp (T1048)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows`

The full exfil-triage pipeline: per host it totals bytes out/in and peak flow, then derives an upload/download ratio AND two fleet-relative measures - share of total egress and how many times the fleet average a host pushed. Two separate `windowcomp` stages (one `sum`, one `avg`, both with no `by` so they span the whole fleet) materialize `fleet_total` and `fleet_avg` as columns every row can divide against. Every ratio uses `divide(to_float(...), to_float(...))` to avoid integer truncation, and `multiply(..., 100)` + `round` turns the share into a clean percentage. Only hosts whose ratio crosses the EXFIL threshold survive the final filter.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows
| comp sum(bytes_out) as total_out, sum(bytes_in) as total_in, max(bytes_out) as peak_out by host
| filter total_in > 0
| windowcomp sum(total_out) as fleet_total
| windowcomp avg(total_out) as fleet_avg
| alter ratio = divide(to_float(total_out), to_float(total_in))
| alter pct_of_fleet = round(multiply(divide(to_float(total_out), to_float(fleet_total)), 100))
| alter dev_from_avg = round(divide(to_float(total_out), to_float(fleet_avg)))
| alter exfil_flag = if(ratio > 50, "EXFIL", "normal")
| filter exfil_flag = "EXFIL"
| sort desc total_out
| fields host, total_out, peak_out, ratio, pct_of_fleet, dev_from_avg, exfil_flag
```
